modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble connecting wireless keyboard to Windows computer

full_description_text:  
I try to connect my wireless keyboard to the computer, but it just won't work. I have Windows and the keyboard is new, but it doesn't seem to recognize it. I don't know what to do, and it's really frustrating because I need it for work. Can someone help me figure this out?
short_description: Trouble connecting wireless keyboard to Windows computer
description: I try to connect my wireless keyboard to the computer, but it just won't work. I have Windows and the keyboard is new, but it doesn't seem to recognize it. I don't know what to do, and it's really frustrating because I need it for work. Can someone help me figure this out?
